# terrible_infoblox_nios_modules_nios_member (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `host_name` (String) Specifies the host name of the member to either add or remove from the NIOS instance. Users can also update the name as it is possible to pass a dict containing *new_name*, *old_name*. See examples.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `comment` (String) A descriptive comment of the Grid member.
- `config_addr_type` (String) Address configuration type (IPV4/IPV6/BOTH).
- `create_token` (Boolean) Flag for initiating a create token request for pre-provisioned members.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `enable_ha` (Boolean) If set to True, the member has two physical nodes (HA pair).
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `extattrs` (String) Extensible attributes associated with the object.
- `external_syslog_server_enable` (Boolean) Determines if external syslog servers should be enabled.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ipv6_setting` (String) Configures the IPv6 settings for the grid member.
- `lan2_enabled` (Boolean) When set to "true", the LAN2 port is enabled as an independent port or as a port for failover purposes.
- `lan2_port_setting` (String) Settings for the Grid member LAN2 port if 'lan2_enabled' is set to "true".
- `master_candidate` (Boolean) Configures the instance of this object to be enabled as a Grid Master Candidate or a regular member node. True enables the member as a Master Candidate
- `mgmt_port_setting` (String) Settings for the member MGMT port.
- `node_info` (String) Configures the node information list with detailed status report on the operations of the Grid Member.
- `platform` (String) Configures the Hardware Platform.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `pre_provisioning` (String) Pre-provisioning information.
- `router_id` (Number) Virtual router identifier. Provide this ID if "ha_enabled" is set to "true". This is a unique VRID number (from 1 to 255) for the local subnet.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Configures the intended state of the instance of the object on the NIOS server.  When this value is set to `present`, the object is configured on the device and when this value is set to `absent` the value is removed (if necessary) from the device.
- `syslog_servers` (String) The list of external syslog servers.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `upgrade_group` (String) The name of the upgrade group to which this Grid member belongs.
- `use_syslog_proxy_setting` (Boolean) Use flag for external_syslog_server_enable , syslog_servers, syslog_proxy_setting, syslog_size.
- `vip_setting` (String) Configures the network settings for the grid member.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
